basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Multi-Tasking Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Multi-Tasking Attendant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 1 Multi-Tasking Attendant post. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Multi-Tasking Attendant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must have passed the 10th standard.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Multi-Tasking Attendant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Multi-Tasking Attendant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIT Madras Multi-Tasking Attendant posts is 11th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Multi-Tasking Attendant post is passing the 10th standard examination.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Multi-Tasking Attendant position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Multi-Tasking Attendant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 23,400/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Multi-Tasking Attendant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Multi-Tasking Attendant post in this recruitment drive by IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for IIT Madras Multi-Tasking Attendant recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Multi-Tasking Attendant role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a test or interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Multi-Tasking Attendant position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, which will contain detailed information.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from any state apply for this job?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for IIT Madras, located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Candidates from all states are generally eligible to apply if they meet the criteria.

faq.question: Q10. How do I apply for the Multi-Tasking Attendant post?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted online through the official website of IIT Madras or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.
